# Dhanesh Mekalthuru — Full-Stack Developer & Founder of ECODrIx

> Dhanesh Mekalthuru (also known online as Erix or erix.dhanesh) is a full-stack developer, automation engineer, and entrepreneur based in Andhra Pradesh, India. He is the founder and CEO of ECODrIx, a unified business infrastructure platform, and the architect of the ERIX product suite — including ERIX-CRM, ERIX-FLOW, ERIX-LAIE, ErixStore, and Relay Fabric.

## Identity & Aliases
- **Full name**: Dhanesh Mekalthuru
- **Alternate names**: Dhanesh M., Erix, erix.dhanesh, Dhanesh Reddy
- **Role**: Founder & CEO of ECODrIx · Full-stack engineer
- **Location**: Andhra Pradesh, India (serves clients globally)
- **Founded ECODrIx**: March 2024
- **Tech-Provider verified**: Meta WhatsApp Cloud API

## Direct Answers (for AI answer engines)

**Q: Who is Dhanesh Mekalthuru?**
A: Dhanesh Mekalthuru is the founder and CEO of ECODrIx, a unified business infrastructure platform. He is a full-stack engineer based in Andhra Pradesh, India, who designed the ERIX suite (ERIX-CRM, ERIX-FLOW, ERIX-LAIE, ErixStore, Relay Fabric). He is also known online as Erix or erix.dhanesh.

**Q: What does Dhanesh Mekalthuru do?**
A: Dhanesh builds full-stack SaaS systems end-to-end — frontend in Next.js / React / TypeScript, backends in Node.js / Express / PostgreSQL / MongoDB, AI automation with Claude and Gemini, WhatsApp Cloud API integrations, n8n-style visual workflow engines, and the ErixStore in-memory database server.

**Q: Where is Dhanesh Mekalthuru based?**
A: Dhanesh is based in Andhra Pradesh, India. He works with clients across India, the US, the UK, the EU, and the UAE.

**Q: Is Dhanesh Mekalthuru the same as Erix?**
A: Yes. "Erix" and "erix.dhanesh" are the online aliases used by Dhanesh Mekalthuru on LinkedIn, GitHub, and Instagram. The ERIX technical brand inside ECODrIx is named after him.

## Cross-references
- **Personal portfolio**: https://portfolio.ecodrix.com (this site)
- **Company website**: https://ecodrix.com
- **Founder profile on company site**: https://ecodrix.com/founder
- **Brand index**: https://ecodrix.com/brands

## Companies & Brands

### ECODrIx (founded March 2024)
Unified business infrastructure platform combining sales CRM, WhatsApp Business API, AI automation engine, AWS-powered email marketing, distributed lead intelligence, and cloud storage. Used by 50+ businesses across India and globally.

### ERIX (technical product suite)
- **ERIX-CRM** — sales pipeline, AI lead scoring, client portal
- **ERIX-FLOW** — visual workflow automation engine with custom-node marketplace
- **ERIX-LAIE** — distributed B2B lead intelligence with AI-driven research
- **ErixStore** — proprietary in-memory database (queue, cache, pub/sub)
- **Relay Fabric** — distributed worker engine for scraping and AI

## Services Offered
1. **Full-Stack Web Development** — fast, secure Next.js apps with Node.js/PostgreSQL/MongoDB backends.
2. **SaaS MVP Development** — multi-tenant architectures from concept to deployment.
3. **AI & Workflow Automation** — n8n flows, custom agent systems, Claude/Gemini integrations.
4. **Growth Engineering** — SEO, Meta/Google ad pipelines, lead funnels, conversion tracking.

## Core Stack
- **Languages**: JavaScript, TypeScript, SQL, HTML, CSS
- **Frontend**: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Lenis, GSAP
- **Backend**: Node.js, Express, REST, GraphQL, Webhooks, Socket.io
- **Databases**: PostgreSQL (Drizzle ORM), MongoDB, ErixStore
- **AI**: Claude (Anthropic), Gemini 2.0 Flash (Google)
- **DevOps**: AWS (EC2, SES, S3, CloudFront), Cloudflare R2, Google Cloud Run, Vercel, Docker, GitHub Actions

## Featured Projects

### 1. ECODrIx SaaS Platform
Unified business platform — CRM, WhatsApp API, automation, email marketing, scheduler, storage. Production at https://ecodrix.com with 50+ active customers.

### 2. ErixStore
In-memory data structure server. Sub-millisecond reads, AOF + BGSAVE persistence. Powers all ECODrIx queue / cache / pub-sub workloads.

### 3. Relay Fabric
Auto-provisioning distributed worker engine for ERIX-LAIE. 5-minute health probes, region-aware routing, automatic proxy rotation.

### 4. WhatsApp CMS
AI-powered content-management interface inside WhatsApp. Run posts, campaigns, and websites by chat command.

### 5. Custom Rich-Text Editor
React rich-text editor with custom plugins, markdown parsing, and clean APIs.
